Based on the latest news, here are the top AI agent infrastructure announcements this week:

## Key Announcements

**Microsoft's Agent Governance Toolkit**:

citations.cited_text: Microsoft released the Agent Governance Toolkit, an open-source security shield for AI agents protecting against 10 critical attack types—goal hijacki...
citations.title: Daily AI Agent News - Last 7 Days

content.text: Microsoft released the Agent Governance Toolkit, an open-source security shield for AI agents protecting against 10 critical attack types—goal hijacking, memory poisoning, and rogue agents.

citations.cited_text: The toolkit works instantly (under 0.1 milliseconds) to block dangerous agent actions before they execute.

content.text: NeuBird AI announced its next-generation agent, codenamed Falcon, which is three times faster than its predecessor and is averaging around 92% in confidence scores.

The company raised $19.3 million in funding.
